case_title: AMIN, G. S. vs. TATE, RONALD et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT TATE, RONALD RIDGE, YUETTE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT TATE, RONALD RIDGE, YUETTE

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMIN, G. S. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-09-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAY-16-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TATE, RONALD RIDGE, YUETTE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 226 SIXTH STREET, #38, SAN FRANCISCO $1,200.00 RENT, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,280.00, STAYED UNTIL JUN-01-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFENDANTS, RONALD TATE AND YVETTE RIDGE, VACATE THE PREMISES AT 226 SIXTH STREET, #38, SAN FRANCISCO BY 6-1-94 RENT AND DAMAGES SHALL BE WAIVED.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $13.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMIN, G. S.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT TATE, RONALD RIDGE, YUETTE

JUDGMENT IS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF, G. S. AMIN IS AWARDED POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 226 SIXTH STREET, #38, SAN FRANCISCO. THE LEASE IN THIS MATTER IS FORFEITED. A WRIT OF POSSESSION SHALL ISSUE IMMEDIATELY AND THERE WILL BE A PREPOSTING OF THE PREMISES. EXECUTION WILL BE STAYED ON THIS WRIT UNTIL 6-1-94, 9 AM. IF DEFENDANTS, RONALD TATE AND YVETTE RIDGE. DO NOT VACATE BY THIS DATE AND TIME THE WRIT WILL BR EXECUTED IMMEDIATELY WITH NO FURTHER STAY OF EXECUTION. RENTS AND DAMAGES TOTALING $L,280.00 WILL BE OWED TO PLAINTIFF BY DEFENDANTS. THESE RENTS AND DAMAGES WILL BE WAIVED IF DEFENDANTS MOVE BY 6-1-94 AT 9 AM. EACH PARTY WILL WAIVE ANY CLAIM OF ACTION AGAINST EACH OTHER. NO PARTIES OTHER THAN DEFENDANTS ARE OCCUPYING THE PREMISES AT 226 SIXTH STREET #38, SAN FRANCISCO. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT ON THE PREMISES AFTER 6-1-94, 9 AM WILL BECOME THE LANDLORDS. EACH SIDE WILL BEAR ITS OWN COSTS.
